description:
The class_loader package is a ROS-independent package for loading plugins during runtime and the foundation of the higher level ROS "pluginlib" library.
    class_loader utilizes the host operating system's runtime loader to open runtime libraries (e.g. .so/.dll files), introspect the library for exported plugin classes, and allows users to instantiate objects of these exported classes without the explicit declaration (i.e. header file) for those classes.

Collection of cmake/make build tools primarily for ecl development itself, but also
     contains a few cmake modules useful outside of the ecl.

Maintains the ecl licenses and also provides an install
     target for deploying licenses with the ecl libraries.
Tools and utilities for ecl development.

The Kinematics and Dynamics Library (KDL) defines a tree structure
   to represent the kinematic and dynamic parameters of a robot
   mechanism.
authors: Wim Meeussen, Ioan Sucan, Jackie Kay

description:
The pluginlib package provides tools for writing and dynamically loading plugins using the ROS build infrastructure.
    To work, these tools require plugin providers to register their plugins in the package.xml of their package.
authors: Eitan Marder-Eppstein, Tully Foote, Dirk Thomas, Mirza Shah

description: Wrapper around libcurl, it provides a fixed CMake module and an ExternalProject build of it.

This package retrieves data from url-format files such as http://,
   ftp://, package:// file://, etc., and loads the data into memory.
   The package:// url for ros packages is translated into a local
   file:// url.  The resourse retriever was initially designed to load
   mesh files into memory, but it can be used for any type of
   data. The resource retriever is based on the the libcurl library.
The package provides the environment variables `ROS_VERSION` and `ROS_DISTRO`.

description: The entry point package for the ament buildsystem in CMake.
The auto-magic functions for ease to use of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

The core of the ament buildsystem in CMake.

    Several subcomponents provide specific funtionalities:
    * environment: provide prefix-level setup files
    * environment_hooks: provide package-level setup files and environment hooks
    * index: store information in an index and retrieve them without crawling
    * package_templates: templates from the ament_package Python package
    * symlink_install: use symlinks for CMake install commands

description: *eProsima Fast CDR* is a C++ serialization library implementing the Common Data Representation (CDR) mechanism defined by the Object Management Group (OMG) consortium. CDR is the serialization mechanism used in DDS for the DDS Interoperability Wire Protocol (DDSI-RTPS).

description:
tf2 is the second generation of the transform library, which lets
    the user keep track of multiple coordinate frames over time. tf2
    maintains the relationship between coordinate frames in a tree
    structure buffered in time, and lets the user transform points,
    vectors, etc between any two coordinate frames at any desired
    point in time.
authors: Tully Foote, Eitan Marder-Eppstein, Wim Meeussen

description:
This package contains a C++ parser for the Unified Robot Description
    Format (URDF), which is an XML format for representing a robot model.
    The code API of the parser has been through our review process and will remain
    backwards compatible in future releases.
A package which extends 'ros_base' and includes high level packages like vizualization tools and demos.
A package which extends 'ros_core' and includes other basic functionalities like tf2 and urdf.
A package to aggregate the packages required to use publish / subscribe, services, generate messages and other core ROS concepts.

This package contains a recent version of the Kinematics and Dynamics
    Library (KDL), distributed by the Orocos Project.
readme: Kinematics Dynamics Library: Orocos project supply RealTime usable kinematics dynamics code, code rigid body kinematics calculations representations kinematic structures inverse kinematic solvers.

description:
ROS2 driver for a generic Linux joystick.
    Will contain a MacOS and Windows version later.
    The joy package contains joy_node, a node that interfaces a
    generic Linux joystick to ROS2. This node publishes a "Joy"
    message, which contains the current state of each one of the
    joystick's buttons and axes.
authors: Morgan Quigley, Brian Gerkey, Kevin Watts, Blaise Gassend, Jonathan Bohren

readme: Uncrustify source code beautifier ObjectiveC, Java, Pawn VALA Features highly configurable configurable options version add/remove spaces `sp_before_sparen`: _Add remove space 'if', 'for', 'switch', 'while', `sp_compare`: _Add remove space compare operator </details> add/remove newlines `nl_if_brace`: _Add remove newline 'if' `nl_brace_while`: _Add remove newline 'while' 'do' statement_ </details> add/remove blanklines `eat_blanks_before_close_brace`: remove blank lines `nl_max`: maximum consecutive newlines blank lines)_ </details> indent code `indent_switch_case`: _indent_switch_case: Spaces indent 'case' 'switch'_ `indent_class_colon`: indent stuff leading base class colon_ </details> align code `align_func_params`: _Align variable definitions prototypes functions_ `align_struct_init_span`: span aligning struct initializer values align)_ </details> modify code `mod_full_brace_for`: _Add remove braces single-line 'for' statement_ `mod_paren_on_return`: _Add remove unnecessary paren 'return' statement_ </details> configuration file, source give pretty good idea Uncrustify Binaries Pre compiled binaries Windows downloaded Build CMake tool generates build systems (Makefiles, Visual Studio project files, Xcode project files generate build system Uncrustify CMake, create build folder run CMake mkdir build build cmake cmake Xcode Xcode) build tools build system cases simply Windows MSBuild Visual Studio). CMake invoke cmake --build testing enabled, CMake generates test target, build build system tools test). invoked CTest: ctest Debug install target, install Uncrustify executable (typically install). note CMake configurations build systems single-configuration, means build type running CMake setting CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE variable), generated files build configuration. description:
`image_geometry` contains C++ and Python libraries for interpreting images
    geometrically. It interfaces the calibration parameters in sensor_msgs/CameraInfo
    messages with OpenCV functions such as image rectification, much as cv_bridge
    interfaces ROS sensor_msgs/Image with OpenCV data types.
